LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PETITIONER ROBERT IMHOFF'S HEARING FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DENIED BECAUSE IT IS SUPPORTED BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CINDY LEE, TEL. NO. 885-5800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. FRANCESCA GESSNER, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4762 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PETITIONER ROBERT IMHOFF'S Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus IS DENIED BECAUSE IT IS SUPPORTED BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
